hero.title: Engineering Systems That Scale
hero.subtitle: Enterprise Software · AI & Machine Learning · Cloud Infrastructure · IoT & Edge
hero.description: Kubva pane akangwara otomatiki kuenda kune gore-chizvarwa mapuratifomu, isu tinogadzira uye tinoendesa tekinoroji inopa simba mabhizinesi ane chishuwo - nenguva, pabhajeti, pachiyero.

services.subtitle: Masevhisi edu
services.title: Yakazara-Spectrum Injiniya
services.description: Nzvimbo nhanhatu dzekudzidzira. Chikwata chimwe chete. Chikamu chega chega chetekinoroji yako stack — kubva kumucheto zvishandiso kusvika kumadhibhodhi emabhizinesi.

customSoftware.title: Tsika Software Kuvandudza
customSoftware.description: Zvishandiso zvemazuva ano zvakavakwa ne microservices, APIs, uye gore-chizvarwa dhizaini.

aiMl.title: AI, ML uye Bhizinesi Intelligence
aiMl.description: AI / ML mapaipi, Power BI madhibhodhi, uye epamberi analytics ayo anoshandura data kuita sarudzo.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture & Infrastructure
cloud.description: Multi-gore zvivakwa zvine midziyo, serverless, uye yepasi rose scalability yakavakirwa mukati.

iot.title: IoT & Edge Computing
iot.description: Yakabatana zvishandiso, mapatya edhijitari, uye kumucheto komputa yeIndasitiri 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering
devops.description: CI / CD mapaipi, zvivakwa sekodhi, uye kucherechedzwa kubva kuzvipira kusvika pakugadzirwa.

digital.title: Dhijitari Shanduko uye Consulting
digital.description: Tekinoroji zano, mepu dzemigwagwa yemazuva ano, uye maoko-pane kubvunza.

cta.title: Ngatigadzirei chimwe chinhu chakakomba
cta.description: Kubva pakuvandudza software yetsika uye AI-powered mhinduro kune gore zvivakwa uye otomatiki - isu tinopa magumo-kusvika-kumagumo tekinoroji masevhisi anoenderana nezvaunoda.

credibility.subtitle: Nhoroondo yedu yekufambisa
credibility.title: Mhedzisiro Kwete <gradient>Zvipikirwa</gradient>
credibility.description: Kubva kuSarajevo kuenda kuOslo, Amsterdam neBerlin. Zvirongwa zvekambani zvinounzwa nenguva, nguva dzese.

atlascopco.label: Cloud IAM yeAtlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Yakagadzira yekutanga-yakavakirwa gore-yakavakirwa One Identity zvivakwa zveAtlas Copco paAzure Kubernetes, ichideredza mutengo uchichengetedza kutevedzera bhizinesi.

orange.label: Orange Cyberdefense Platform
orange.outcome: Yakagadzira Azure Kubernetes zvivakwa, CI / CD mapaipi, uye tsika ServiceNow kusangana kweEurope inotungamira cybersecurity kambani.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Yakavakwa GIS chikuva mepu yepasi pevhu zvinoshandiswa kuGerman nekuona kudhumhana kunodzivirira mamirioni emamiriyoni eEuro kukuvara kwezvivakwa.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub inotarisira zviuru zvezvishandiso, Synapse ichigadzirisa mabhiriyoni emitsara ye telemetry, iine kumucheto aggregation ichideredza mutengo wemeseji ne ~ 90%.

drone.label: Autonomous Drone Platform
drone.outcome: Tsika yendege controller ine 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub bhiriji inogonesa yakazvimiririra BVLOS ndege dzekurima kuongorora uye kubhadharisa kuendesa.

payment.label: Payment System Rescue
payment.outcome: Yakanunura kukundikana kwekubhadhara gedhi reNorway nharembozha nekudzosera-injiniya isina kunyorwa nhaka kodhi. Zero kubhadhara nguva yekuzorora mushure mekuvandudzwa.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Yakavakwa Maya plugin iyo yakacheka 3D modelling uye animation nguva ne50% pane hombe AAA studio, yakagamuchirwa sechishandiso chakajairwa mupombi yekugadzira.

social.label: Nzvimbo-Yakavakirwa Social Platform
social.outcome: Yakagadziriswa kufambidzana app yehupenyu hwehusiku hweSpain ine geolocation kuenzanisa, chaiyo-nguva mameseji, uye kusundira zviziviso zvemutengi weUK.

iga.label: Multi-Tenant IGA Platform
iga.outcome: Yakavakwa musimboti backend yegore-native identity governance platform inoshandira Fortune 500 vatengi vane tsika ASP.NET Core Identity yeNoSQL padanho rebhizinesi.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Adjacent, Global Delivery
euAdjacent.description: CET maawa ekushanda ane ruzivo rwunosanganisira Norway, Netherlands, Germany, uye kupfuura.

yourEngineers.title: Vatengesi vako, kwete mutengesi
yourEngineers.description: Nhengo dzechikwata dzakazvitsaurira dzakabatanidzwa mubasa rako rebasa uye zvishandiso. Hapana mamaneja eakaundi, hapana mitsara yematikiti.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware kune ICloud
hardwareToCloud.description: Kubva kune yakabatanidzwa mudziyo firmware kune bhizinesi Azure Synapse mapaipi. ● Yakazara software pane yega yega nhanho.

partners.subtitle: Tekinoroji Stack
partners.title: Battle-Tested <gradient>Stack</gradient>
partners.description: Hatisi kungoshandisa maturusi aya chete — isu takatumira masisitimu ekugadzira navo. Kubva kuMicrosoft Azure kuenda kuKubernetes, mainjiniya edu anobata chaiyo-yepasirese hunyanzvi.

cloudInfra.label: Cloud & Infrastructure
cloudInfra.description: Multi-gore dhizaini ine mudziyo orchestration uye zvivakwa sekodhi.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.description: Yemazuva ano chikamu masisitimu ane mhando chengetedzo uye yakagadziridzwa kuvaka tooling.

backend.label: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Bhizinesi-giredhi server mapuratifomu, mitauro yehurongwa, uye yazvino API paradigms.

data.label: Dhata uye Kuchengetedza
data.description: Zvinyorwa, zvinyorwa, uye mu-ndangariro zvitoro zvine yakazara-chinyorwa kutsvaga.

devops.label: DevOps & Tooling
devops.description: CI / CD mapaipi, vhezheni yekudzora, uye kugadzirwa kwevagadziri.

cloudNative.title: Cloud-Native by Default
cloudNative.description: Purojekiti yega yega inogadzirwa, CI / CD-inotyairirwa, uye yakavakirwa chiyero chakatwasuka kubva pazuva rekutanga.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: Kubva kuReact frontends kuenda ku .NET microservices kuenda kuKubernetes masumbu — timu imwe, kumagumo kusvika kumagumo.

productionProven.title: Production-Proven
productionProven.description: Aya haasi matekinoroji edemo. Chishandiso chega chega chakanyorwa chinopa simba masisitimu chaiwo anoshandira vashandisi chaivo nhasi.

faq.subtitle: Ruzivo rweRuzivo
faq.title: <gradient>Mibvunzo Inowanzo Bvunzwa</gradient>
faq.description: Zvese zvaunoda kuti uzive nezve kushanda neHorizon Tech

scope.question: Ndeipi nzvimbo yako yebasa?
scope.answer: Isu tinoendesa magumo-kusvika-kumagumo tekinoroji mapurojekiti: tsika bhizinesi software, AI / ML mapaipi, gore zvivakwa, IoT masisitimu, DevOps otomatiki, uye kubvunza shanduko yedhijitari. Kunyangwe iwe uchida chikuva chakazara chakavakirwa kubva pakutanga kana kusangana kwakanangwa neyako iripo stack, isu tinobata dhizaini, kusimudzira, kuyedza, uye kutumirwa.

stack.question: Ndeipi yako yepakati tekinoroji stack?
stack.answer: Yedu yepakati stack inotarisana nemabhizinesi-giredhi mapuratifomu: Azure uye AWS yegore, .NET uye Node.js yekumashure, React uye Angular yefrontend, Kubernetes uye Docker yeorchestration, uye Terraform yezvivakwa sekodhi. Isu tinoshandawo zvakanyanya nePython yeAI / ML mitoro yebasa, Power BI uye Fabric yehungwaru hwebhizinesi, uye PostgreSQL, SQL Server, uye MongoDB yedata.

enterprise.question: Iwe unobata sei mapurojekiti ebhizinesi?
enterprise.answer: Kubatanidzwa kwega kwega kunotanga nechikamu chekutsvaga kutsanangura chiyero, dhizaini, uye zviitiko. Iwe unowana timu yakazvipira ine hunyanzvi hwekutungamira, nguva dzose kuongororwa kwezviitiko zvakakosha, uye kuwana kwakananga kune mainjiniya anovaka system yako. Isu tinoteedzera agile sprints nevanobatika demos, chengetedza akajeka mapurojekiti mabhodhi, uye tinopa vhiki nevhiki kufambira mberi mishumo.

support.question: Chii chinonzi post-launch rutsigiro?
support.answer: Isu tinopa yakarongeka rutsigiro tiers ine yakatsanangurwa SLAs, kusanganisira 24/7 kuongorora, kupindura kwechiitiko, kugadzirisa mashandiro, uye chimiro iteration. Zvibvumirano zvedu zvekutsigira zvinofukidza bug fixes, chengetedzo patches, zvivakwa zvezvivakwa, uye proactive hutano cheki - yakagadzirirwa yako uptime uye yekupindura-nguva zvinodiwa.

integration.question: Unogona here kubatanidza zvivakwa zvedu zviripo?
integration.answer: Chaizvoizvo. Isu tinonyanya kuita nhaka yemazuva ano, API-yekutanga kusangana, uye hybrid gore kutama. Kunyangwe iwe uchida kubatanidza kune on-premise ERP masisitimu, kutama kubva kune monoliths kuenda kune microservices, kana kuvhara dhatabhesi yenhaka neazvino frontends, isu tine mabhuku ekutamba ekutama uye ruzivo rwekubatanidza kuti zviite zvisina musono.

industries.question: Ndeapi maindasitiri awakashanda mairi?
industries.answer: Chikwata chedu chakaendesa mapurojekiti kune fintech, hutano, zvigadzirwa, e-commerce, simba, uye zvikamu zvehurumende. Isu tinonzwisisa indasitiri-yakatarwa zvinodiwa sePCI-DSS yekubhadhara, HIPAA kufunga kwehutano hwehutano, GDPR kutevedzera misika yeEU, uye chaiyo-nguva telemetry yemaindasitiri IoT.

engagement.question: Maitiro ekubatanidza anotaridzika sei?
engagement.answer: Inotanga nekufona kwekutsvaga kuti unzwisise zvinangwa zvako uye nzvimbo yehunyanzvi. Kubva ipapo, isu tinoendesa gwaro rekuongorora rine mazano ekuvaka, nguva, uye kuparara kwekudyara. Kana tangobvumidzwa, isu tinotanga nechikwata chakazvitsaurira, mubhodhi mune ako maturusi uye mafambiro, uye tinotanga yekutanga sprint mukati memazuva.

faq.ctaDescription: Une purojekiti mupfungwa? Ngatitaurei chiyero, nguva, uye bhajeti.
